title: Tools, Resources, Prompts, and Server Instructions · Threat Case: Prompts
summary: Design a minimal MCP surface for an internal knowledge and action service. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext prompts increment in an MCP primitive and naming contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.
Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
